## Architecture

This repository is now a Go CLI implementation of `agent-init`. The old bash executable and top-level legacy `templates/` tree have been removed; the command starts at `cmd/agent-init/main.go` and delegates into `internal/cli`, `internal/flavors`, and `internal/scaffold`.

The Go command currently supports `agent-init init [flavor] [target-dir]`, `agent-init list-flavors`, and `agent-init version`. For migration convenience, calling it without a subcommand, with flags first, or with a target path directly is treated as `init`. `internal/cli` owns argument parsing and user-facing command behavior; it resolves the requested flavor from `internal/flavors` and passes a concrete scaffold request to `internal/scaffold`.

Flavors are described by `internal/flavors.Flavor`: name, display name, description, embedded template filesystem, template root, and executable paths. The first registered flavor is `fullstack`, backed by `internal/flavors/fullstack/templates`, which is embedded into the Go binary with `embed.FS`. `internal/scaffold` walks that embedded tree, renders only `.tmpl` files with `text/template`, copies all other files verbatim, sets executable modes for known scripts, creates the Claude/Codex symlinks, and optionally runs `git init`.

There are two kinds of files to keep distinct. The authoritative downstream scaffold lives under `internal/flavors/fullstack/templates/` and is embedded into the Go binary. The top-level `.agent/`, `.devcontainer/`, `Justfile`, and `.pre-commit-config.yaml` are this repository's own working environment for developing the Go CLI.

The generated codemap section intentionally omits hidden directories such as `.agent/`, `.devcontainer/`, and `.github/`, so the hand-written section is the place to document those operational files. The devcontainer Dockerfile installs Go, goimports, and golangci-lint; until the container is rebuilt, a temporary toolchain may be needed to run checks in the current shell.

GitHub Actions lives under `.github/workflows/`. Pull requests to `main` run the local done gate (`just check`). Pushes to `main` run the same gate, build Linux release artifacts through a matrix, upload tarballs, generate SHA-256 checksums, and create a GitHub release.

## Key files

| File | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `cmd/agent-init/main.go` | Go CLI entry point; wires stdio, build metadata, and `internal/cli`. |
| `internal/cli/cli.go` | Parses commands and flags, lists flavors, prints version info, and dispatches scaffold runs. |
| `internal/cli/cli_test.go` | CLI behavior tests for flavor listing, legacy init invocation, unknown flavors, and version output. |
| `internal/flavors/flavor.go` | Shared flavor metadata type consumed by the scaffold engine. |
| `internal/flavors/registry.go` | Flavor registry and default fullstack registration. |
| `internal/flavors/fullstack/flavor.go` | Fullstack flavor embed point and executable-path metadata. |
| `internal/flavors/fullstack/templates/` | Embedded fullstack scaffold copied by the Go CLI. |
| `internal/scaffold/scaffold.go` | Scaffold writer: embedded file walk, substitution, skip/force behavior, symlinks, executable bits, and optional git init. |
| `internal/scaffold/scaffold_test.go` | Scaffold behavior tests for writes, project-name substitution, executable scripts, symlinks, skip/force, and dry run. |
| `go.mod` | Go module definition and toolchain version floor. |
| `README.md` | User-facing documentation for building and running the Go CLI. |
| `internal/flavors/fullstack/templates/.agent/AGENTS.md.tmpl` | Fullstack downstream agent instructions with `.ProjectName` substitution. |
| `internal/flavors/fullstack/templates/.agent/scripts/check.sh` | Fullstack downstream done-gate script; runs codemap, client generation, npm checks, and Playwright when present. |
| `internal/flavors/fullstack/templates/.agent/scripts/record-feature.sh` | Fullstack downstream Playwright/ffmpeg helper for feature recordings. |
| `internal/flavors/fullstack/templates/Justfile.tmpl` | Fullstack downstream command surface expected by `check.sh`. |
| `internal/flavors/fullstack/templates/.pre-commit-config.yaml` | Fullstack downstream pre-commit hook config. |
| `.devcontainer/Dockerfile` | Local Go CLI devcontainer with Go, goimports, golangci-lint, Node tooling, and agent CLIs. |
| `.github/workflows/pr.yml` | Pull request CI; installs Go tooling and runs `just check`. |
| `.github/workflows/release.yml` | Main-branch release workflow; checks, builds Linux binaries, and publishes a GitHub release. |
| `.pre-commit-config.yaml` | Local pre-commit config with Go formatting hooks and pre-push done gate. |
| `.agent/AGENTS.md` | Project-specific instructions for this repo; canonical for current agent work. |
| `.agent/CODEBASE.md` | This file; generated tree plus hand-written architecture notes. |
| `.agent/scripts/check.sh` | Required Go-specific done gate for this repo. |
| `Justfile` | Local Go command surface for formatting, linting, tests, cross-builds, and smoke tests. |

## Where to add things

- Go CLI command/flag behavior -> edit `internal/cli/` and add tests in `internal/cli/*_test.go`.
- Go scaffold write behavior -> edit `internal/scaffold/` and add tests in `internal/scaffold/*_test.go`.
- Fullstack embedded scaffold change -> edit `internal/flavors/fullstack/templates/`, then run the scaffold smoke test once that recipe exists.
- Flavor metadata or registry changes -> edit `internal/flavors/` and the relevant `internal/flavors/<name>/` package.
- This repo's local agent instructions/codemap/corrections -> edit `.agent/` only when explicitly requested.
- This repo's local devcontainer behavior -> edit `.devcontainer/`.
- Future global gitignore support -> add under `internal/gitconfig/` with fake-`HOME` tests and no silent mutation outside the explicit flag path.
- Future integration/golden tests -> add under `test/` and `testdata/golden/<flavor>/`.

## Conventions specific to this codebase

- The Go CLI is the implementation. Do not reintroduce a checked-in bash `agent-init` executable or top-level `templates/` tree.
- Hidden scaffold files are omitted from the generated tree by `gen-codemap.sh`; use `git ls-files` and explicit hidden-file reads when auditing the actual shipped template surface.
- Template substitution is opt-in: only `.tmpl` files are rendered with Go `text/template`, and the `.tmpl` suffix is stripped on write.
- `embed.FS` does not preserve executable bits or symlinks; keep executable paths in flavor metadata and symlink creation in `internal/scaffold`.
- Top-level `AGENTS.md` points to `.agent/AGENTS.md`; top-level `CLAUDE.md` points to `.agent/CLAUDE.md`; `.agent/CLAUDE.md` points back to `AGENTS.md` within `.agent/`.
- Do not confuse this repo's own `.agent/` and `.devcontainer/` with the embedded fullstack templates.
- The done gate must still be run after documentation-only edits; it regenerates this codemap and will preserve this hand-written section.
